changelog:
THE SOVEREIGN NOMADIC UPDATE (v6.2):
- [SYSTEM] The Nomadic Protocol: Absolute domain independence. Migrate your SQLite database to a new domain, and Relay will automatically fire a Re-Sync pulse to update your coordinates across the entire Constellation.
- [SYSTEM] The Escape Pod: One-click core database export from the Control Room for safe backup and portability.
- [SECURITY] Secret Handshake Tokens: Symmetric cryptography token exchange prevents spoofing and secures your identity across domains.
- [SECURITY] True Rate Limiting & WAF Shield: Cloudflare integration optimizations and hardened PHP endpoints.
